log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Warforged — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:20+9=29 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
REASONING: Power Word Stun on Warforged — Unarmored Caster (HP 67 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Warforged — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:7+9=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
REASONING: Finger of Death on Warforged — Unarmored Caster. 7d8+30 necrotic.
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Warforged — Unarmored Caster.
→ Warforged — Unarmored Caster: CON save [d20:20+4=24 vs DC 20] SUCCESS. 20 necrotic damage (half).
